modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble inserting in Word document

full_description_text: I was trying to insert something in Word but it just won't work. I don't know what I'm doing wrong. Can you help me figure this out? I need it for my report that's due soon.
description: I was trying to insert something in Word but it just won't work. I don't know what I'm doing wrong. Can you help me figure this out? I need it for my report that's due soon.
